intro.title: Studies
intro.body: I'm currently studying informatics at Università della Svizzera italiana, in Lugano. I previously studied in Neuchâtel, where I obtained a bachelor's degree in history and art history.

articles.title: Bachelor in Informatics
articles.place: Università della Svizzera italiana, Lugano, CH
